name: Zendesk (npx)
description: Manage Zendesk Support tickets through natural language: retrieve, search, create, and update tickets, add public or private comments, handle tags, and inspect linked incidents.

inputs.label: Zendesk Subdomain
inputs.description: Your Zendesk subdomain - the part before .zendesk.com in your account URL (e.g. for https://yourcompany.zendesk.com, enter 'yourcompany').

inputs.label: Zendesk Email
inputs.description: The email address of the Zendesk agent account used to authenticate. The API token is appended to this account via token auth.

inputs.label: Zendesk API Token
inputs.description: A Zendesk API token used together with your agent email for token-based authentication.

obtain.instructions:
1. Sign in to Zendesk as an admin
2. Go to Admin Center > Apps and integrations > APIs > Zendesk API
3. Open the Settings tab and enable Token access
4. Click 'Add API token'
5. Optionally add a description, then copy the generated token (it is shown only once)

auth.instructions: Create a Zendesk API token in Admin Center > Apps and integrations > APIs > Zendesk API token, and authenticate with your agent email plus the token.
